CustomMetadata.label: GU-011 - No login rate limiting on Exper

values.value: No login rate limiting on Experience sites

One or more live Experience networks have no lockout policy configured for login attempts. Without rate limiting, automated tools can attempt thousands of password combinations against community member logins.
Without rate limiting, credential stuffing and brute-force attacks against community member logins are unconstrained. An attacker can systematically compromise community user accounts.
Configure max failed login attempts and lockout duration on each Experience network in Setup > Digital Experiences > [Site] > Administration > Login.
